untranslatable_reason: VWMACD (Volume Weighted MACD) is not available in the allowed indicators list. The standard MACD indicator has been used as a proxy, but VWMACD incorporates volume weighting which the standard MACD does not. The exact volume-weighting methodology described in the source text cannot be replicated with available indicators.
translation_notes: Signal requires VWMACD which is not in the allowed indicator set. Substituted with standard MACD and macd_signal. The direction is context-dependent (long on crosses above, short on crosses below). Exit conditions use reversal logic (crossing back below/above signal line) as author did not specify explicit exit criteria.
